zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Noell於1165年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾倫哈爾時，她的父親Thomas Noell14歲，母親Margaret Strange5歲。她於1202年與William de Harcourt Governor of Tamworth Castle在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1235年之前在英國奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Noell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Nöll): habitational name from any of several places in Rhineland and Westphalia named Nöll. Compare Noll 3.

variants.name: Noll
meanings: German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names composed of the first element ending with -n + wald ‘rule’, for example Arnold and Reinwald .
South German: nickname for a rotund or naive person, from Middle High German nol ‘hillock, knoll’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Noell was born in 1165, in Ellenhall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Noell, was 14 and her mother, Margaret Strange, was 5. She married William de Harcourt Governor of Tamworth Castle in 1202, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 1235, in Oxfordshire, England.

Elle a épousé William de Harcourt Governor of Tamworth Castle en 1202, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1235, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Noellが1165年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエレンハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Noellは14歳，母Margaret Strangeは5歳であった。1202年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでWilliam de Harcourt Governor of Tamworth Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1235年以前にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Noell(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘렌홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Noell(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Strange(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 William de Harcourt Governor of Tamworth Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1235년 이전 영국 스퍼드실르에서 사망했다.

ro.Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England: Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Noell родилась в 1165 г. в местности элленолл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Noell было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Strange, 5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Harcourt Governor of Tamworth Castle в 1202 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 1235 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия.
